nasb.text: Soon afterwards, He began going around from one city and village to another, proclaiming and preaching the kingdom of God. The twelve were with Him,

esv.text: Soon afterward he went on through cities and villages, proclaiming and bringing the good news of the kingdom of God. And the twelve were with him,

cnv.text: 不久，耶穌周遊各城各村講道，宣揚　神的國的福音，和他在一起的有十二個門徒，

ccb.text: 此后，耶稣到各城镇去传扬上帝国的福音。同行的有十二使徒，

csbs.text: 不久以后，耶稣走遍各个城镇乡村，讲道、传神国的福音。与他在一起的有十二使徒。
